[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001000 2
1 0001101 3
2 0001100 2
3 1100010 3
4 0010111 4
5 1011111 6
6 0000110 2
7 0001101 3

70 07 0000010 1
